tasks.label: run-migration
tasks.command: cd backend && echo test && dir /b src\db\migrations\*.sql

tasks.label: update-journal
tasks.command: $j = Get-Content 'backend/src/db/migrations/meta/_journal.json' -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json ; $entry = [PSCustomObject]@{idx=4; version='7'; when=1782490000000; tag='0004_add_informed_consent'; breakpoints=$true} ; $j.entries += $entry ; $j | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10 | Set-Content 'backend/src/db/migrations/meta/_journal.json' -Encoding UTF8 ; Write-Host 'Journal updated'

tasks.label: apply-sql-migration
tasks.command: docker exec -i kidneybuddy-db psql -U kidneybuddy -d kidneybuddy -c "ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS informed_consent boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false;"

tasks.label: apply-sql
tasks.command: docker exec -i kidneybuddy-db psql -U kidneybuddy -d kidneybuddy --command "ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS informed_consent boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false;"

tasks.label: apply-sql-via-stdin
tasks.command: echo 'ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS informed_consent boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false;' | docker exec -i kidneybuddy-db psql -U kidneybuddy -d kidneybuddy

tasks.label: record-migration
tasks.command: echo "INSERT INTO drizzle.__drizzle_migrations (id, hash, created_at) VALUES (4, '0004_add_informed_consent', 1782490000000) ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;" | docker exec -i kidneybuddy-db psql -U kidneybuddy -d kidneybuddy

tasks.label: record-migration2
tasks.command: Set-Content -Path tmp_mig.sql -Value "INSERT INTO drizzle.__drizzle_migrations (id, hash, created_at) VALUES (4, '0004_add_informed_consent', 1782490000000) ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;" ; Get-Content tmp_mig.sql | docker exec -i kidneybuddy-db psql -U kidneybuddy -d kidneybuddy ; Remove-Item tmp_mig.sql

tasks.label: run-migration-script
tasks.command: docker cp backend/src/db/migrations/apply_0004.js kidneybuddy-backend:/app/src/db/migrations/apply_0004.js ; docker exec kidneybuddy-backend node --import tsx src/db/migrations/apply_0004.js

tasks.label: run-mig-again
tasks.command: docker cp backend/src/db/migrations/apply_0004.js kidneybuddy-backend:/app/src/db/migrations/apply_0004.js ; docker exec kidneybuddy-backend node --import tsx src/db/migrations/apply_0004.js

tasks.label: restart-backend
tasks.command: docker-compose up -d backend 2>&1 ; Write-Host 'RESTART_EXIT:' $LASTEXITCODE

tasks.label: check-register-error

tasks.label: quick-verify
tasks.command: docker exec kidneybuddy-backend node --import tsx -e "import{reminderSchedule}from'./src/db/schema/reminderSchedule.schema.js';import{users}from'./src/db/schema/users.schema.js';import{db}from'./src/lib/db.js';import{eq,and}from'drizzle-orm';(async()=>{const[user]=await db.select().from(users).limit(1);const rems=await db.select().from(reminderSchedule).where(and(eq(reminderSchedule.userId,user.userId),eq(reminderSchedule.jenis,'obat'),eq(reminderSchedule.aktif,true)));const days=['Minggu','Senin','Selasa','Rabu','Kamis','Jumat','Sabtu'];const j=new Date(Date.now()+7*3600*1000);const tn=days[j.getUTCDay()].toLowerCase();for(const r of rems){const ha=r.hariAktif;console.log('Reminder:',r.nama,'hariAktif:',JSON.stringify(ha),'today:',tn,'matches:',Array.isArray(ha)&&ha.includes(tn));}console.log('Done');process.exit(0);})()" 2>&1 ; Write-Host '' ; Write-Host 'CHECK_EXIT:' $LASTEXITCODE

tasks.label: check-user-reminders
tasks.command: docker exec kidneybuddy-backend node --import tsx -e "import{db}from'./src/lib/db.js';import{users}from'./src/db/schema/users.schema.js';import{medicationLog}from'./src/db/schema/medicationLog.schema.js';import{reminderSchedule}from'./src/db/schema/reminderSchedule.schema.js';import{eq,and}from'drizzle-orm';(async()=>{const[user]=await db.select().from(users).limit(1);console.log('User:',user.email);const rems=await db.select().from(reminderSchedule).where(and(eq(reminderSchedule.userId,user.userId),eq(reminderSchedule.jenis,'obat'),eq(reminderSchedule.aktif,true)));const days=['Minggu','Senin','Selasa','Rabu','Kamis','Jumat','Sabtu'];const j=new Date(Date.now()+7*3600*1000);const tn=days[j.getUTCDay()].toLowerCase();let found=false;for(const r of rems){const ha=r.hariAktif;if(Array.isArray(ha)&&ha.includes(tn)){console.log('MATCH:',r.nama,'at',r.jamPengingat);found=true;}}if(!found)console.log('No matching reminders for today');process.exit(0);})()" 2>&1 ; Write-Host '' ; Write-Host 'CHECK_EXIT:' $LASTEXITCODE

tasks.label: ship-preflight-2

tasks.label: commit-phase2
tasks.command: git add -A 2>&1 ; Write-Host 'Staged all files' ; git commit -m 'Phase 2: Fluid and Medication Tracking with Reminders' -m '- Responsive UI shell (AppShell, BottomNav, Sidebar, FAB) - PWA: Serwist service worker, manifest, push subscription client, iOS gate - AES-256-GCM encryption + VAPID push infrastructure - Fluid tracking: CatatCairanSheet/Form, CAPD effluent alert, offline queue - Daily balance: DeltaCairanCard with real-time calculation - Medication reminders: CRUD API, type-aware forms (Obat/CAPD/HD) - Reminder dispatch: node-cron every minute, WIB timezone, 30-min follow-up - Beranda D-04: ObatCard, PengingatBerikutnyaCard, AiPlaceholderCard - Catatan page: FluidLogList, MedicationLogList with inline confirm - Token refresh mechanism for expired access tokens - Fix: sw.ts process.env crash, SW API intercept, double toast, ObatCard day filter' 2>&1 ; Write-Host '' ; Write-Host 'COMMIT_EXIT:' $LASTEXITCODE
